project: Sovereign 200x Machine — blueprint parity (Waves A-F) + provider sovereignty (Waves H-L), built on the Phase 1-22 expert machine

tasks.title: Wave A: Source/Citation Graph
tasks.acceptance: prompt_clusters/source_domains/source_mentions/source_opportunities/source_edges with RLS + provenance; source-graph engine builds the normalized graph from citation_sources + ai_probe_traces during scans; /api/source-graph serves nodes/edges/opportunities/neighbors/path; Source Graph tab renders a custom SVG force graph + ranked fixes; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave B: Merchant/Product AI visibility
tasks.acceptance: product_visibility_snapshots tracks Shopping SERP + AI recommendation presence with data_source/confidence; runProductVisibility probes via serp-router + ai-gateway and degrades honestly; merchant tab shows presence rates + recent snapshots; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave C: Grounded AI UI capture
tasks.acceptance: Playwright microservice captures real ChatGPT/Perplexity/AI-Overview UI behind signed-request auth, returns null (never fakes) on failure; visibility-scanner labels grounding_mode=ui_capture; service excluded from app tsconfig; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave D: Unified dashboards
tasks.acceptance: AI Visibility War Room (SoV, per-engine health, crawler activity, competitor moves, actions-to-win, score+drop alerts); standalone Proof Ledger timeline with before/after drill-down; agency cockpit at /app with per-client health/score/open-actions; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave E: Snapshots + data quality
tasks.acceptance: gsc_snapshots/gbp_snapshots/ai_visibility_snapshots/data_quality_scores with RLS + provenance; snapshots engine captures point-in-time history (skips unconnected sources, never fabricates) + per-project measured-signal quality score; daily-snapshots cron runs across projects; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave F: Claims + benchmark harness + refund shield
tasks.acceptance: Claims registry maps every advertised metric to a capability gate; forbidden-claim guard blocks rank-#1 / appear-everywhere-in-AI; benchmark.mjs (in verify:all) validates registry integrity + forbidden copy + reports backed claims (offline/zero-paid safe, --strict for keyed audit); deterministic-only refund shield + marketing-copy audit; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave H: Provider port/adapter abstraction
tasks.acceptance: Unified capability port (serp/crawl/backlinks/generate/email/social/enrich) with ranked adapters, health, cost/confidence/freshness, auto-failover and a ZERO_PAID_KEYS gate that drops paid vendors; serp-router delegates to it; isZeroPaidKeysMode + PAID_PROVIDERS added; provider/zero-paid diagnostics on /api/capabilities; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave I: Sovereign data layer
tasks.acceptance: Round-robin proxy pool (OMNIDATA_PROXIES) for the keyless Playwright SERP scraper; multi-instance SearXNG failover (SEARXNG_URLS); Common Crawl authority-rank ingestion + getDomainAuthority/normalizeAuthority for a free DR-style score; offline parity tests for the new pure helpers; verify:all + omnidata:parity green.

tasks.title: Wave J: Sovereign AI layer
tasks.acceptance: generate-router routes content generation Ollama-first through the generate port with editorial-QA + structural-AEO quality gates; weak open-model output transparently upgrades to a paid LLM when configured, else returns best sovereign output flagged degraded; generateWithAI delegates so paid keys are an optional quality lever; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave K: Sovereign comms + enrichment
tasks.acceptance: Sovereign-first SMTP email transport (SPF/DKIM/DMARC guidance, Resend optional) powering all report/alert emails; direct X + LinkedIn posting adapters; free keyless IP->ASN/org visitor enrichment fallback (honestly low-confidence) replacing Clearbit; all env-gated, never faked, Zero-Paid-Keys aware; verify:all green.

tasks.title: Wave L: Zero-Paid-Keys mode
tasks.acceptance: Claim capability gates are Zero-Paid-Keys aware (paid-only claims collapse to keyless equivalents or unbacked); hasKeylessSerpCapability added; audit:zero-paid-keys runs the claims benchmark with all paid keys stripped and asserts every capability has a sovereign adapter; passes.

tasks.title: Wave M: Docs + manifest v24 + master prompt + loop skill + env
tasks.acceptance: Phase 24 spec + v24 manifest + loop skill phase row + .env notes (AI_UI_CAPTURE_*, ZERO_PAID_KEYS, SMTP/DKIM, OMNIDATA_PROXIES, SEARXNG_URLS, OLLAMA, direct social); production:ready + zero-paid-keys audit green (audit:live requires real keys).
